description: Fix fundamental classification cache return contract — GitHub trovlunde/stock_analyzer#2

userStories.title: Audit fundamental cache return paths
userStories.description: As a developer, I want every success path of the fundamental classification cache helper audited so that callers never receive an inconsistent tuple length.
acceptanceCriteria: All success return paths of prepare_classification_data_cache (fundamental classifier) return exactly two DataFrames (features, targets)
returns data from prepare_classification_data stays internal or is persisted separately — not returned from the cache helper
Document findings in scripts/ralph/progress.txt if any path still violates the contract

userStories.title: Normalize cache miss path to (X, y) only
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the cache-miss compute path to return the same two-tuple as the cache-hit path so train_classifier never fails to unpack.
acceptanceCriteria: Fresh-compute branch returns (features_df, targets_df) only — same shape as cache-hit branch
No caller of the fundamental cache helper expects or unpacks a third returns DataFrame

userStories.title: Add regression test for cache round-trip
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a pytest that exercises cache miss → write → hit → read without network so the return-contract bug cannot regress.
acceptanceCriteria: New test under tests/ mocks prepare_classification_data and uses tmp_path for cache files
Test asserts first call (miss) returns two DataFrames and writes cache files
Test asserts second call (hit) returns two DataFrames with matching columns and row count
Test does not call yfinance or any live market API
Prior art pattern from tests/storage/test_cache_store.py (round-trip, TTL-style isolation)

userStories.title: Verify batch training unpacks cached results
userStories.description: As a developer running SP500 fundamental classifier training, I want train_classifier to aggregate mocked tickers without unpack errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Test calls train_classifier with two mocked tickers: first cache miss, second cache hit
No 'too many values to unpack' or tuple-length errors during aggregation
train_classifier returns daily and weekly classifier objects on success
